category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a library for the Flickr API; official librdf page title is `Flickcurl: C library for the Flickr API`: https://librdf.org/flickcurl/

tags_sources: source_facts.description and official page identify a C library and utilities for the Flickr API: https://librdf.org/flickcurl/
